plan.failureSummary: The test failed during a deterministic run because the AI agent attempted to interact with a 'Last Name' field that is no longer present on the page. The failure screenshot shows the field has been renamed or replaced by 'Your Name'. The cached selectors are now stale.
observedIndicators: Deterministic mode used cached selectors for 'Last Name' which is missing in failure screenshot.
Failure screenshot shows 'Your Name' field where cache expected 'Last Name'.
Instruction 'Fill out all of the survey questions' is semantically flexible.
History shows high flakiness, suggesting frequent UI rotations or A/B tests.

remediationSteps.details: Clear the Donobu page.ai cache and retry the test. This will force the agent to perform a fresh autonomous scan of the page and identify the new 'Your Name' field.

remediationSteps.summary: Investigate selector stability if retry fails.
remediationSteps.details: If the failure persists after cache clearance, check if the website uses unstable dynamic IDs (like the '#\:r0\:-form-item' seen in tool calls) and ensure the agent is using more robust semantic locators.

plan.notes: The semantic intent 'Fill out all of the survey questions' is flexible. Since the UI structure changed (confirmed by comparing the tool parameters for 'Last Name' against the 'Your Name' field visible in the failure screenshot), clearing the cache and retrying will allow the autonomous agent to re-scan the page and adapt to the new field names.
